storyP1: I built this because I was tired of gym apps that were either bloated with features I didn't need, locked behind subscriptions, or harvesting my data. I just wanted to log my sets, track my progress, and get on with my workout.
storyP2: So I built exactly that — a simple, fast, no-BS workout tracker. It's free, it's open-source, and it always will be.
featurePwa: Works offline — install it like a native app
featureFree: Free forever — no subscriptions, no ads
openSourceDescription: Licensed under MIT. The code is on GitHub — contributions, issues, and stars are welcome.
supportDescription: Love the app? A donation option is coming soon. In the meantime, star the repo or share it with a friend.
